scope: Pre-v4 registry, roadmap, benchmark mapping, and governance only. No external project functionality is implemented by this registry.

projects.rating_reason: Strong fit for living knowledge base, memory lifecycle, confidence, forgetting, and stale knowledge cleanup patterns.
not_suitable_parts: do not implement the LLM Wiki memory engine before v4
do not copy external project code
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Only registry and roadmap mapping are allowed before v4.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as a post-v4 memory lifecycle benchmark.

projects.rating_reason: High-value benchmark for auto wiki, knowledge graph, document understanding, RAG trace, and agentic RAG.
suitable_for_heitang: knowledge graph and visual trace inspiration
not_suitable_parts: do not embed WeKnora code before v4
do not claim agentic RAG runtime integration
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Auto wiki and graph integration require post-v4 design and review.
projects.recommended_next_action: Map to post-v4 auto wiki and RAG evaluation planning.

projects.rating_reason: Strong ecosystem benchmark for workflow automation, webhook templates, workflow export, external triggers, and distribution.
not_suitable_parts: do not bundle n8n runtime
do not claim workflow execution without a user-owned n8n instance
do not embed credentials in exported workflows
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: The workflow export adapter is available, but importing and executing the workflow requires a user-owned external n8n runtime.
projects.recommended_next_action: Expose workflow export through the later UI/Core Bridge campaign and validate import against a user-owned n8n instance without bundling it.

projects.rating_reason: High-signal skill governance and coding-discipline benchmark already mapped by the external benchmark report.
not_suitable_parts: do not copy prompts or code
do not mark as implemented from benchmark presence
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: This pass only records the benchmark.
projects.recommended_next_action: Use as input for S/A contract inclusion after registry completion.

projects.rating_reason: S-level parser/OCR foundation now backed by an optional local runtime adapter; remains opt-in and not default Core parsing.
not_suitable_parts: do not bundle PaddleOCR or models
do not download models in tests
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Optional local runtime adapter is implemented and P2.1 runtime acceptance is recorded, but it remains dependency-gated, not bundled, not default Core parsing, and not a UI-executable external project.
projects.recommended_next_action: Use when parser-paddleocr is locally installed and selected with parse-with-backend.

projects.rating_reason: S-level candidate for document structure understanding and complex layout parsing.
not_suitable_parts: do not add dependency before v4
do not claim runtime integration
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Adapter implementation and runtime review are post-v4.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep planned adapter status and benchmark mapping.

projects.rating_reason: S-level parser backend now backed by an optional local runtime adapter; remains opt-in and not default Core parsing.
not_suitable_parts: do not bundle Docling
do not make Docling mandatory
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Optional local runtime adapter is implemented and P2.1 runtime acceptance is recorded, but it remains dependency-gated, not bundled, not default Core parsing, and not a UI-executable external project.
projects.recommended_next_action: Use when parser-docling is locally installed and selected with parse-with-backend.

projects.rating_reason: Useful external retrieval and freshness verification provider benchmark.
not_suitable_parts: do not store API keys
do not treat a network provider as a local or offline retrieval runtime
do not mark the full External Source Center complete from a CLI smoke
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: The provider adapter and anonymous real smoke are available, but network access, UI configuration, proxy/reverse-proxy live verification, and provider terms review remain explicit boundaries.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep the integration decision at needs_strengthening until External Source Center configuration and live proxy/reverse-proxy diagnostics are accepted.

projects.rating_reason: Useful trend radar and external signal monitoring benchmark already present in external benchmark mapping.
not_suitable_parts: do not add network monitors before v4
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Network-dependent signal monitoring is post-v4.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as external signal benchmark.

projects.rating_reason: Good fit for prompt asset library and Skill factory enhancement patterns.
suitable_for_heitang: local Skill Factory prompt asset enhancer
not_suitable_parts: do not copy external prompts
do not bundle the external repository
do not replace P2.2 Skill Factory
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: A local Prompt Asset Library enhancer is implemented and validated, but external prompt/code copying remains license-gated and full UI/Core Bridge acceptance is later in sequence.
projects.recommended_next_action: Expose the local prompt asset status and preview through later Skill Factory / Template Library UI workflow without claiming external runtime readiness.

projects.rating_reason: Useful multimodal skill package and visual state card benchmark.
not_suitable_parts: do not add multimodal runtime before v4
do not claim MMSkills repository clone or OSWorld runtime execution
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: A local schema/package reference exists, but MMSkills repository/runtime access is not integrated and UI/Core Bridge execution is not available.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep runtime integration out of scope; use the local visual state card/keyframe package contract as Template Library and Artifact Management evidence.

projects.rating_reason: Relevant to content asset management, storyboard metadata, continuity tracking, and AIGC production planning; now represented by a local original Content Asset Schema reference without runtime bundling.
not_suitable_parts: do not copy Jellyfish source, prompts, scripts, or repository contents
do not bundle short-drama workbench runtime
do not execute video generation, asset rendering, media upload/download, crawler, or account operations
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Local Content Asset Schema reference evidence is implemented, but full Template Library / Artifact Management UI workflow and Campaign 4 acceptance are later sequence work.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as local original Content Asset Schema reference evidence and continue to Section 5 item 5.10 story-flicks.

projects.rating_reason: A/B benchmark for story-to-video and subtitle/audio/image asset chains.
not_suitable_parts: do not implement video generation runtime before v4
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Local AIGC video pipeline schema reference evidence is implemented, but full Template Library / Artifact Management / Document Generation UI workflow and Campaign 4 acceptance are later sequence work.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as local original AIGC video pipeline schema reference evidence and continue to Section 5 item 5.11 seedance2-skill.

projects.rating_reason: Verified public MIT video prompt Skill reference represented as local non-executable template metadata; provider execution remains unavailable.
not_suitable_parts: do not copy external SKILL.md or prompt text
do not collect provider credentials
do not call Seedance or another video provider
do not claim video generation runtime
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Repository identity and MIT license are verified, but only local metadata is implemented. Exact provider API and pricing contracts were not verified because official documentation access timed out; API key, network, provider terms, cost controls, and a later authorized adapter would still be required.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as verified reference-only template metadata with no executable action; continue to Section 5 item 5.12 RAG-Anything.

projects.rating_reason: Useful multimodal RAG, cross-modal relationship, and benchmark reference represented locally without embedding the vendor runtime.
suitable_for_heitang: cross-modal trace and evidence schema reference
future retrieval and reports status surface
not_suitable_parts: do not bundle or execute the RAG-Anything runtime
do not replace the existing RAG main chain
do not require LightRAG, MinerU, LLM/VLM, embeddings, or vector storage for the local schema
do not claim Campaign 3.0 external-source ingestion or verification
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Only a local schema, trace contract, and benchmark profile are implemented. Vendor runtime, model/provider execution, retrieval quality acceptance, and full UI workflow are not integrated.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as reference-only cross-modal schema and benchmark evidence; continue to Section 5 item 5.13 mattpocock/skills.

projects.rating_reason: Useful engineering Skill and AI collaboration governance benchmark represented locally as a project-original rule-pack without copying external Skill files or runtime.
not_suitable_parts: do not copy external Skill files, prompts, scripts, or code
do not install or execute an external Skill runtime
do not create, bind, or execute an Agent from this source
do not redo Anything2Skill, SkillX, Anthropic skill-creator, or P2.2 Skill Governance unless DU/KB compatibility breaks
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: A local engineering governance rule-pack is implemented and validated, but it is not a business runtime and full UI/Core Bridge acceptance is later in sequence.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as local governance rule-pack evidence and continue to Section 5 item 5.14 Sirchmunk.

projects.rating_reason: Useful embedding-free and index-free direct raw-data retrieval benchmark now represented by a local bounded direct-file-search provider candidate.
suitable_for_heitang: source trace and evidence map without vector DB
not_suitable_parts: do not clone or execute the Sirchmunk vendor runtime
do not require LLM API key, network, embedding, vector DB, or external dependencies
do not replace AnySearchSkill, RAG-Anything, WeKnora, or the existing retrieval main chain
do not allow unsafe paths outside the selected workspace
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: A local bounded direct-file-search provider candidate is implemented and validated, but full UI/Core Bridge acceptance is later in sequence and Sirchmunk vendor runtime is not bundled.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as local direct-file-search evidence and continue to Section 5 strengthening item 5.S1 GBrain.

projects.rating_reason: Useful marketing, growth workflow, and content operations benchmark now represented by a local original Marketing Skill Pattern Library.
not_suitable_parts: do not copy external content templates
do not run crawler, paid media, account operations, or revenue automation
projects.reason_not_ready_before_v4: Local pattern library evidence is implemented, but full Template Library UI workflow and Campaign 4 acceptance are later sequence work.
projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as local original Marketing Skill Pattern Library evidence and continue to Section 5 item 5.8 ai-money-maker-handbook.

projects.recommended_next_action: Keep as P3 benchmark-only runtime/tooling reference; do not add binary, proxy, or runtime dependency before explicit decision.
